hero.headline_pt2: Wrong Place. Wrong Time. Every Time.
hero.subtext: Cherri+ deploys autonomous AI agents across your entire pharmaceutical network — forecasting demand, triggering replenishment, and eliminating expiry losses. Automatically.
hero.trust: No commitment required · 14-day pilot with your own data · Cancel anytime
hero.see_how: ↓ See how agents work in under 90 seconds
hero.social_proof: Trusted by supply chain teams managing ₹500Cr+ in annual pharma inventory

feature_intro.badge: 850+ SKUs MONITORED LIVE ACROSS YOUR NETWORK
feature_intro.title_pt2: Chase Stock. The Agents Do It.
feature_intro.desc: Most pharma networks still run on spreadsheets, WhatsApp chains, and gut instinct. Cherri+ replaces that chaos with three autonomous AI agents — running 24/7, acting on live data, and surfacing only what needs your attention.
feature_intro.f1_desc: Real-time stock levels across every SKU, branch, and warehouse — surfaced in a single dashboard. Critical alerts reach the right person in under 3 seconds.
feature_intro.f2_title: Automate the Repetitive. Approve the Critical.
feature_intro.f2_desc: AI agents handle routine reorders, redistribution routing, and PO generation. Your team approves high-value decisions in one click — everything else runs automatically.
feature_intro.f3_desc: Every order, every expiry, every demand pattern feeds the model. Cherri+ gets smarter with your network — delivering 94% forecast accuracy within 60 days of deployment.

outcomes.desc: Pharmaceutical networks running Cherri+ report measurable impact within 90 days of deployment.
outcomes.t1_q: Using Cherri+ changed how we think about supply chain. We went from reactive fire-fighting to proactive control. Our expiry write-offs dropped 38% in the first quarter alone. The ROI was visible before the pilot even ended.
outcomes.t2_q: It's the only platform where the AI actually does the work — not just shows you a dashboard. My team approves decisions, they no longer make them from scratch every morning. That shift alone saved us 20 hours a week.

use_case.desc: Cherri+ adapts to how your team actually works. Pharmacists see stock alerts. Distributors manage redistribution. Executives track network-wide ROI. Every role gets a tailored view — with zero training required.
use_case.cta1: See How It Works for Your Role →
use_case.cta2: Talk to a supply chain specialist ↗
use_case.pain_pharmacist: I find out we're out of stock when a patient asks for it. By then, it's already too late.
use_case.how_pharmacist: Real-time stock dashboard surfaces critical shortages instantly. AI suggestion card shows recommended reorder quantity with confidence score. One-click approval sends the PO. No spreadsheets. No phone calls. No guesswork.
use_case.o2_pharmacist: Critical alerts visible in under 3 seconds
use_case.o4_pharmacist: Reorder PO generated and sent in under 4 minutes
use_case.pain_distributor: I'm managing 50 locations on a spreadsheet and a WhatsApp group. Redistribution decisions take 3 days and cost us expiry write-offs every quarter.
use_case.how_distributor: Redistribution Agent identifies surplus vs. deficit across your entire network and proposes optimal transfer routes. Approval queue replaces email chains. Network map shows risk zones in real time.
use_case.o2_distributor: Redistribution decisions made in minutes, not days
use_case.pain_scm: I have no visibility until the damage is already done. Stockouts show up as lost revenue reports 2 weeks later.
use_case.how_scm: Forecasting Agent predicts demand gaps 30 days ahead. KPI command center shows stock health, expiry risk, and agent activity — all in one screen. Predictive alerts reach you before the shortage happens, not after.
use_case.o2_scm: 4-hour advance warning on critical supply gaps
use_case.o4_scm: Full agent audit trail — every decision logged and explainable
use_case.pain_executive: I can't connect supply chain decisions to bottom-line impact. Every board meeting is guesswork dressed up as analysis.
use_case.how_executive: Executive dashboard translates supply chain data into financial language. Cost-per-SKU, expiry P&L impact, agent ROI, and network risk — all in one view. Board-ready reports generated automatically.
use_case.o1_executive: Real-time P&L visibility on supply chain decisions
use_case.o4_executive: One-screen view of 200+ locations, zero operational overhead

faq.q1: What makes Cherri+ different from standard inventory management tools?
faq.a1: Most inventory tools show you dashboards. Cherri+ acts on them. We deploy three autonomous AI agents — Reorder, Redistribution, and Forecasting — that continuously monitor your network and execute decisions in real time.
faq.q2: Can I trust the AI to make supply chain decisions without human oversight?
faq.a2: Yes — and you remain in control at every level. Cherri+ uses a Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) architecture. Every agent action includes a confidence score, a clear reasoning explanation, and an approval option.
faq.q3: How quickly will we see measurable ROI?
faq.a3: Most networks see measurable results within 30–45 days. Our benchmark data shows expiry waste reduction and stockout drops within the first quarter.
faq.q4: How is our pharmaceutical inventory data protected?
faq.a4: Cherri+ is SOC 2 Type II certified and built on HIPAA-compliant infrastructure. All data encrypted in transit and at rest.
faq.q5: Does Cherri+ integrate with our existing ERP or pharmacy management system?
faq.a5: Yes. Cherri+ connects to all major ERP platforms via REST API. Typical integration takes 3–5 business days.
faq.q6: How accurate is the demand forecasting?
faq.a6: Cherri+ achieves 94% demand forecast accuracy within 60 days of deployment, measured against actual consumption.
faq.q7: We operate 80+ branches across 3 states. Can Cherri+ handle that scale?
faq.a7: Cherri+ is built for multi-location pharmaceutical networks. It currently monitors 200+ branch networks simultaneously with sub-15-minute inventory refresh rates.
faq.q8: What happens if I disagree with an AI recommendation?
faq.a8: Every agent recommendation can be overridden with a single click. You are always the final decision-maker.

final_cta.title_pt1: Your Competitors Are Already Moving to
final_cta.desc: Every day on your old system costs you another batch of expired stock. Start your 14-day data pilot today. See the ROI before you buy.
final_cta.trust1: Secure · SOC 2 Compliant · Setup in 5 Days
final_cta.trust2: Only 4 enterprise onboarding slots remaining for this month

feature_grid.desc: Three AI agents. Seven critical capabilities. One platform that acts before your team even knows there's a problem.
feature_grid.c1_desc: AI agents analyze 36 months of sales history, seasonal patterns, and regional signals to predict stock needs up to 30 days ahead. Reorder triggers qualify automatically — no manual intervention.
feature_grid.c2_desc: Stock hits threshold. Agent fires PO. Human approves or it executes. Time-to-order: under 4 minutes.
feature_grid.c3_desc: Every batch moves through a lifecycle. Agents flag redistribution windows 45 days before the expiry date hits.
feature_grid.c4_desc: Agents cross-reference pending POs across all branches before submission. Consolidates duplicates. Saves 8–12% on procurement costs.
feature_grid.c5_desc: Query live inventory data in plain language. Get answers, alerts, and recommendations from your AI in seconds — not hours.
feature_grid.c5_a: Insulin at Branch 4 expires in 12 days. Redistribute 480 units to Mumbai?
feature_grid.c6_title: From manual chaos to autonomous execution.
feature_grid.c6_desc: When stock crosses the minimum threshold, the Reorder Agent creates a purchase order, selects the optimal supplier, and routes it for approval — or auto-executes based on your policy rules. Your team focuses on exceptions, not routine.
feature_grid.c7_title: The right alert. The right person. Every time.
feature_grid.c7_desc: AI agent actions trigger role-scoped notifications. Pharmacists see stock alerts. Managers see PO queues. Executives see network risk summaries.

footer.tagline: The autonomous supply chain platform for modern pharmaceutical networks.
